groups.name: Backend Shared
groups.description: Shared guardrails and conventions for all backend services

groups.name: Order-Payment Integration
groups.description: API contracts, retry policies, and error mapping between Order and Payment systems

lessons.title: No force push to main
lessons.content: Never use git push --force on main/master branch. Use --force-with-lease if absolutely necessary, and only after team approval.

lessons.title: Require tests before deploy
lessons.content: All deployments must pass CI tests. Never skip tests or deploy from a failing branch.

lessons.title: No secrets in code
lessons.content: Never commit API keys, tokens, passwords, or other secrets to the repository. Use environment variables or a secrets manager.

lessons.title: Payment API retry policy
lessons.content: Payment API calls should retry with exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s) up to 3 times. Do not retry on 4xx errors (client errors). Only retry on 5xx and network timeouts.
